notification_body: Dear {name}, you have been identified as at-risk based on recent assessment. Reason: {reason}. Please contact your counselor for support.
email_body_stakeholder:
Dear {stakeholder_name},

This is to inform you that {count} student(s) under your supervision have been flagged as at-risk in the recent assessment.

Please review the attached detailed report and take appropriate action.

Key concerns:
{summary}

Best regards,
{institution}
template_urgent_meeting: Urgent: Please schedule a meeting with your counselor within 24 hours regarding your academic status.
template_support_available: Academic support services are available to help you succeed. Please reach out to discuss your concerns.
template_improvement_plan: Let's work together on an improvement plan. Contact me to schedule a convenient time to meet.
template_follow_up: Following up on our previous discussion. How can I support you this week?
mentor_one_click_failed: Failed to send message to some students. Please check logs.
search_no_results: No students found matching your criteria
generated_by: Generated by AI-Based Dropout Prediction System
institution_name: Government of Rajasthan - Department of Technical Education
